CVE-2010-2526.title: The cluster logical volume manager daemon (clvmd) in lvm2-cluster ...
CVE-2010-2526.description: The cluster logical volume manager daemon (clvmd) in lvm2-cluster in LVM2 before 2.02.72, as used in Red Hat Global File System (GFS) and other products, does not verify client credentials upon a socket connection, which allows local users to cause a denial of service (daemon exit or logical-volume change) or possibly have unspecified other impact via crafted control commands.

CVE-2020-8991.title: vg_lookup in daemons/lvmetad/lvmetad-core.c in LVM2 2.02 mismanag ...
CVE-2020-8991.description: vg_lookup in daemons/lvmetad/lvmetad-core.c in LVM2 2.02 mismanages memory, leading to an lvmetad memory leak, as demonstrated by running pvs. NOTE: RedHat disputes CVE-2020-8991 as not being a vulnerability since there’s no apparent route to either privilege escalation or to denial of service through the bug
